message:
fix: prevent dog Refresh from leaving inconsistent state on partial failure

Refresh and RefreshRig now save partial progress to the state file before
returning errors, so worktree paths stay consistent with reality. Also
added working-dog check to refuse refresh while a dog is actively working.

Fixes gt-94mvj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
